results.title: Prince Harry and Meghan Markle's US popularity 'takes nosedive' as they lose goodwill
results.description: Prince Harry and Meghan Markle's popularity in the US has taken a "nosedive," according to American journalist Paula Froelich, who says their approval ratings now match their low UK figures
